description_long: This is a modern suburban house complex with a main single-story residence and an attached two-story garage structure. The property is enclosed by a white fence and features a spacious driveway, a manicured lawn, and several mature trees. The backyard includes a swimming pool, a patio with lounge chairs, and an outdoor dining area with a table and chairs. The house exterior is finished in dark gray siding with white trim, and the roof is a combination of gable and hip styles. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and side facades, providing ample natural light. The main entryway is accentuated by a small porch with steps and a gabled overhang.
description: A modern, dark gray house with a two-story garage, fenced yard, pool, and outdoor living spaces. Features include a gabled roof, large windows, and landscaped grounds.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two-story garage, driveway, and front yard with a tree.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard pool, patio, lounge area, and large windows along the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive lawn, pool area, and outdoor dining setup, with the garage in the background.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the garage, side yard, and the transition between the main house and garage structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with small porch, steps, and a gabled overhang
